basics.name: Dhanashree Balaram
basics.summary: Senior AI Engineer and Project Manager specializing in vision-language-action models, 3D generative modeling, and multimodal AI systems.

work.position: Senior AI Engineer and Project Manager
work.summary: Leading research on robotic-arm-based in-cabin testing for automotive manufacturing and VLA models for autonomous driving.
highlights: Leading research on robotic-arm-based in-cabin testing using vision-language-action models and world models.
Implemented anchor-based flow-matching action expert models for multimodal trajectory planning in autonomous vehicles.
Spearheaded Multimodal Semantic Search from concept to deployment — adopted as an internal AI tool across all Volkswagen brands.
Adapted pi-0 VLM+diffusion model for trajectory prediction with an L2 of 1.3m error.
Proposed novel 3D point-cloud generation architecture using probabilistic diffusion models for structural car design.
Two patents pending for multimodal guidance and feature-aware sampling for 3D diffusion.
Led EV battery usage pattern analysis using graph cascaded clustering.

work.summary: Zero-shot and self-supervised learning for fashion attribute classification.
highlights: Proposed and implemented Zero-Shot Learning to classify stylistic fashion elements, improving F1 scores on 5 categories by 10%.
Improved MOCO-V3 performance on fashion style classification with an average F1 increase of 2% across 5 categories.

work.summary: Multimodal video content classification for brand safety.
highlights: Improved F1-score on weapon detection in video frames by 6% via fine-tuning CLIP for multi-label classification.

work.summary: Independent research across generative models, vector search, and recommender systems.
highlights: Led research and prototyping on StyleGAN2 latent space interpolation for image enhancement.
Created a prototype combining generative techniques with vector search for face attribute retrieval.
Led a team to design a production-ready recommender system using Contextual Bandits on in-app click data.
Implemented and deployed ML/DL microservices on AWS for emerging product development.

publications.name: MIDAS: Multi-LLM Iterative Data-Adaptive Summarization
publications.summary: A multi-LLM iterative framework for data-adaptive document summarization. (to appear)

publications.name: Graph-Based Two-Level Clustering for Electric Vehicle Usage Patterns
publications.summary: A graph-based two-level clustering framework for EV driving and charging pattern analysis.

publications.name: Promoting Personalized Learning: The Effectiveness of Peer Teaching Pedagogy
publications.summary: Study on peer teaching effectiveness for improving numeracy outcomes in Indian government schools.

publications.name: The Role of Expert-Driven Prompt Engineering for Fine-Grained Classification in Fashion
publications.summary: Expert-crafted prompts for zero-shot fine-grained fashion attribute classification with CLIP.

presentations.name: Recommender Systems and Women Shoppers
presentations.description: Invited talk on recommender systems design with a focus on women shoppers.

teaching.description: Advised senior undergraduate students on capstone projects in AI/ML.
